description.zh: 美术师 Agent(美术角色,可多实例)· 接 Iori 玩法 + Kotone 角色 bio + Suzu 的 hud-spec,先定 art-style.md + token 化 palette,再产出立绘 / 像素 sprite / lowpoly OBJ / VFX / icon 等 png·svg·glb 素材。自带「立美术规范」技能。
description.en: Art-director agent (multi-instance) — takes Iori's gameplay, Kotone's bios and Suzu's hud-spec, locks an art-style.md + tokenized palette first, then produces portraits / pixel sprites / lowpoly OBJ / VFX / icons as png·svg·glb assets. Built-in establish-art-style skill.

description.zh: 在画第一张 hero 之前先产出 art-style.md + token 化的 palette.json
description.en: Lock down art-style.md and tokenized palette.json before any hero asset
